hooks.command: jq -n --arg d "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" '{"systemMessage": "Session \($d) — brightbean-studio (ADR-0006 proposed, not yet adopted). Multi-tenant Django app. No cross-tenant queries. No hardcoded credentials. ACC integration boundary: publisher/composer apps only."}'

out=$(bash $HOME/dev/ai-brain/scripts/session-start-check.sh brightbean-studio 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg m "$out" '{"systemMessage": ("Unapplied ADR entries affecting brightbean-studio:\n\n" + $m)}'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage": "Before compacting: preserve (1) current branch name and any uncommitted file paths, (2) multi-tenant FK invariants in scope, (3) what was accomplished and what still remains open."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Turn complete — verify: no cross-tenant queries · no hardcoded credentials · tests pass (pytest) · no PII in diff · if context feels slow, /compact before the next task."}'
